name: components/number-field
description: A numeric input that supports spinner increment/decrement buttons, min/max constraints, and formatting. Provides a complete composition system with NumberField, NumberFieldGroup, NumberFieldInput, NumberFieldLabel, NumberFieldDescription, NumberFieldErrorMessage, NumberFieldDecrementTrigger, and NumberFieldIncrementTrigger. Supports keyboard arrow-stepping, long-press acceleration, and locale-aware formatting. Built on Kobalte NumberField with full ARIA spinbutton semantics.
useCases: Quantity selectors in e-commerce carts with plus/minus buttons and max-stock limits
Price or budget inputs that format currency and clamp to positive values
Pagination size choosers letting users pick 10, 25, 50, or 100 rows per page
Rating or score inputs where arrow keys increment a value within a 1–10 range
usage: import { NumberField, NumberFieldGroup, NumberFieldInput, NumberFieldLabel, NumberFieldDescription, NumberFieldErrorMessage, NumberFieldDecrementTrigger, NumberFieldIncrementTrigger } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/number-field"
